contentBlocks.original:
बुद्धिर्बलं यशो धैर्यं निर्भयत्वं अरोगता
अजाड्यं वाक्पटुत्वं च हनुमत्स्मरणाद् भवेत्
contentBlocks.transliteration:
buddhirbalaṃ yaśo dhairyaṃ nirbhayatvaṃ arogatā
ajāḍyaṃ vākpaṭutvaṃ ca hanumatsmaraṇād bhavet
contentBlocks.translation: By meditating on Hanuman, one obtains intelligence, strength, fame, courage, fearlessness, health, alertness, and eloquence in speech.
contentBlocks.meanings: बुद्धिः (buddhiḥ) – intelligence; बलं (balaṃ) – strength; यशः (yaśaḥ) – fame; धैर्यं (dhairyaṃ) – courage; निर्भयत्वं (nirbhayatvaṃ) – fearlessness; अरोगता (arogatā) – health; अजाड्यं (ajāḍyaṃ) – alertness; वाक्पटुत्वं (vākpaṭutvaṃ) – eloquence in speech (vāk:speech | paṭutvaṃ:eloquence); च (ca) – and; हनुमत्स्मरणात् (hanumatsmaraṇāt) – by meditating on Hanuman (hanumat:Hanuman | smaraṇāt:by meditating); भवेत् (bhavet) – obtains;
